intro.heading: Queens home loans with a broker who knows the borough
paragraphs: Searching for a mortgage broker in Queens NY, home loans in Flushing, or refinance in Astoria? Green Street Capital helps Queens buyers and homeowners navigate competitive prices, multi-family opportunities, and mixed documentation profiles.

Queens is diverse: two-family homes, condos near transit, and investor deals. We compare conventional, FHA, VA, bank statement, and Non-QM options so your pre-approval matches how lenders actually underwrite your file.
We are a licensed New York mortgage broker (NMLS #2066586) headquartered in Brooklyn, serving Queens and the wider NYC metro with in-person and remote support.
bullets: First-time buyers in Flushing, Elmhurst, Forest Hills & Jamaica
Multi-family purchasers using rental income to qualify
Self-employed Queens professionals needing flexible docs
Homeowners refinancing rate or cashing out equity

market.heading: Financing homes in Queens
paragraphs: Queens often rewards buyers who understand multi-family cash flow and complete paperwork early. A strong pre-approval from a mortgage broker who works Queens files regularly can help your offer stand out.
Taxes, insurance, and HOA costs vary by neighborhood — we help you model full payment before you bid.

faqs.question: Is there a mortgage broker that serves Queens NY?
faqs.answer: Yes. Green Street Capital is a licensed NY mortgage broker serving Queens for purchase, refinance, and specialty loans. Call 718-615-4545 or schedule online.

faqs.question: Can I get an FHA loan in Queens?
faqs.answer: Many Queens properties and buyers qualify for FHA. We check property eligibility, down payment, and credit requirements for your scenario.

faqs.question: Do you finance two-family homes in Queens?
faqs.answer: Yes. Multi-family purchases are common in Queens; we help structure owner-occupied and investment scenarios.

faqs.question: Can self-employed borrowers buy in Queens?
faqs.answer: Yes. Bank statement and other Non-QM options may fit when tax returns understate cash flow.

faqs.question: How fast can I get pre-approved in Queens?
faqs.answer: Many borrowers receive a pre-approval path after an initial consult and basic documents. Timing depends on income type and completeness of paperwork.
